<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="ciyJIa8gAzkdoKyUQsbq" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-441" dy="-192" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;" value="fetch_url / search_and_fetch — Content Routing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="600" x="150" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="url-in" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="URL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="120" x="375" y="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="safety" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="assertPublicUrl()
block private IPs & non-HTTP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="250" x="310" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="blocked" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Error: internal address
blocked (SSRF protection)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="185" x="620" y="163" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gh-decision" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="hostname ==
github.com?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="200" x="335" y="265" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gh-path-decision" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" value="URL path has
/blob/ segment?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="200" x="140" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gh-blob" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="raw.githubusercontent.com
/owner/repo/branch/file" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="30" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gh-api" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#c8e6c9;strokeColor=#388e3c;fontSize=11;" value="api.github.com
/repos/owner/repo/readme" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="260" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="firecrawl" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Firecrawl ($FIRECRAWL_URL)
JS-rendered page → markdown" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="230" x="520" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="output" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="{ title, url, text }
truncated to 8,000 chars" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="335" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gh-token-note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;strokeColor=#c8e6c9;fillColor=#f0fff0;rounded=1;align=center;" value="GITHUB_TOKEN (optional)
60 → 5,000 req/hour" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="165" x="490" y="505" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-in-safety" edge="1" parent="1" source="url-in" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="safety"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-safety-blocked" edge="1" parent="1" source="safety" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#b85450;" target="blocked" value="blocked"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="560" y="185" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-safety-gh" edge="1" parent="1" source="safety" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;fontColor=#388e3c;" target="gh-decision" value="allowed"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-gh-yes" edge="1" parent="1" source="gh-decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;" target="gh-path-decision" value="yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="335" y="302" /> <mxPoint x="240" y="302" /> <mxPoint x="240" y="390" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-gh-no" edge="1" parent="1" source="gh-decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;" target="firecrawl" value="no"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="535" y="302" /> <mxPoint x="635" y="302" /> <mxPoint x="635" y="390" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-blob-yes" edge="1" parent="1" source="gh-path-decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;" target="gh-blob" value="yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="140" y="427" /> <mxPoint x="130" y="427" /> <mxPoint x="130" y="545" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-blob-no" edge="1" parent="1" source="gh-path-decision" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;fontSize=10;" target="gh-api" value="no (repo root)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="340" y="427" /> <mxPoint x="360" y="427" /> <mxPoint x="360" y="520" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-blob-out" edge="1" parent="1" source="gh-blob" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="output"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="130" y="580" /> <mxPoint x="130" y="635" /> <mxPoint x="335" y="635" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-api-out" edge="1" parent="1" source="gh-api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="output"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="360" y="580" /> <mxPoint x="360" y="635" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-firecrawl-out"
